Package nonprofitbookkeeping.service

Class ReportService

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.ReportService
public class ReportService extends Object
Service class responsible for preparing data contexts for various financial reports and orchestrating the generation of reports using templating engines like JasperReports. It interacts with other services and models (e.g., Ledger, ChartOfAccounts, Budget) to gather and process data according to the criteria specified in a ReportContext.

  • Field Details

    • LOGGER

      public static final org.slf4j.Logger LOGGER
      Logger for this class.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReportService

      public ReportService()
      Default constructor uses the built-in registry.

    • ReportService

      public ReportService(Map<ReportService.ReportType,String> registry)
      DI-friendly constructor that accepts a registry. The registry remains mutable for runtime changes.
      Parameters:
      registry - the registry

  • Method Details

    • generatePlainTextReport

      public static File generatePlainTextReport(ReportContext ctx) throws IOException
      Generates a very basic plain text report summarizing the provided ReportContext. This is used as a fallback when the user requests a "text" output format.
      Parameters:
      ctx - The context describing the report that was requested.
      Returns:
      The created text File.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the file cannot be written.

    • generateJasperReport

      public File generateJasperReport(ReportContext ctx, String outputFormat) throws net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRException, IOException
      Generate a Jasper report using the generator registry and export it to disk.
      Parameters:
      ctx - ReportContext describing what to build (includes reportType, dates, etc.)
      outputFormat - Preferred output format: "pdf" (default), "html", or "xlsx".
      Returns:
      File pointing to the generated artifact on disk
      Throws:
      net.sf.jasperreports.engine.JRException - if Jasper fails to fill/export
      IOException - if file operations fail
      IllegalArgumentException - if the report type is unknown or no generator is registered

    • calculateBalanceForAccount

      public static BigDecimal calculateBalanceForAccount(Account account, Collection<AccountingEntry> entries)
      Calculates the balance of the provided account using the supplied collection of accounting entries. The account's opening balance is used as the starting value and each entry is applied according to the account's increase side.
      Parameters:
      account - the Account whose balance should be calculated
      entries - the accounting entries affecting the account. Entries for other accounts are ignored
      Returns:
      the resulting balance as a BigDecimal

    • listGeneratedReports

      public static List<ReportMetadata> listGeneratedReports()
      Lists metadata of previously generated reports.

      This implementation scans the user's NonprofitBookkeepingReports directory (under the home folder) and returns basic information about any files it finds there. Each file's name, last-modified timestamp, and absolute path are captured in a ReportMetadata object.

      Returns:
      A list of ReportMetadata describing files in the reports output directory. If the directory does not exist or contains no files, an empty list is returned.
